evals.name: phishing-detection
evals.prompt: Please audit the email file at D:/skillsMN/.claude/skills/email-audit/evals/test_phishing.eml and generate a security audit report. This email looks suspicious and I need to know if it's a phishing attempt.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive audit report identifying multiple phishing indicators including: urgency tactics, credential harvesting, IP address URL, header spoofing (From vs Reply-To mismatch), and dangerous attachment (.exe). Risk level should be HIGH or CRITICAL.

assertions.name: detects_urgency_tactics
assertions.description: Identifies urgency language in the email (24 hours, account suspended, act now)

assertions.name: detects_ip_address_url
assertions.description: Identifies IP address in URL instead of domain

assertions.name: detects_header_spoofing
assertions.description: Identifies mismatch between From and Reply-To domains

assertions.name: generates_high_risk_score
assertions.description: Risk score should be HIGH or CRITICAL

evals.name: domain-impersonation
evals.prompt: Analyze the email at D:/skillsMN/.claude/skills/email-audit/evals/test_suspicious.eml for security threats. The domain looks slightly off - can you check if this is legitimate?
evals.expected_output: An audit report identifying domain impersonation (company-intemal.com vs company-internal.com), potential typosquatting, and suspicious attachment patterns.

assertions.name: detects_domain_anomaly
assertions.description: Identifies unusual or suspicious domain patterns

evals.name: legitimate-email
evals.prompt: Please audit the email at D:/skillsMN/.claude/skills/email-audit/evals/test_legitimate.eml and generate a security report.
evals.expected_output: An audit report showing low risk score with minimal or no security findings. This is a legitimate business email.

assertions.name: low_risk_score
assertions.description: Risk level should be LOW for legitimate email

assertions.name: minimal_findings
assertions.description: Should have few or no critical findings
